title: CLEAR autonomy.yml schema
description: Schema for CLEAR framework autonomy boundary definitions

project.description: Name of the project this autonomy file governs

modules.description: List of path-level autonomy boundary rules (most specific match wins)

level.description: full-autonomy: AI proceeds freely | supervised: AI generates, human reviews | humans-only: AI must not generate code

reason.description: Human-readable justification for the autonomy level

sources_of_truth.description: Canonical sources for domain concepts — AI derives from these, never invents

source_of_truth.description: Primary authoritative source for this concept

defined_in.description: File(s) where this concept is formally defined

note.description: Optional clarifying note about how conflicts are resolved
